executiveSummary: Double Diamond Steel has a solid Squarespace website with some smart fundamentals in place -- LocalBusiness schema, Google Analytics, branded email, and Facebook Pixel. You clearly understand the value of a digital presence. But the site itself is barely scratching the surface of what it could do for you.

The biggest issue: you have 9 services (Steel Sales, Press Brake, Plasma Cutting, Metal Fabrication, Custom Metal Art, Metal Shearing, Nuts and Bolts, Welding Supplies, Local Delivery) but they're all crammed onto the homepage as 1-3 sentence cards. Google can't rank you for 'plasma cutting Chico CA' or 'custom metal fabrication Northern California' because those terms don't exist on dedicated, indexable pages.

On top of that, your sitemap shows 8 total pages -- and 2 of them are literally named 'New Page' and 'New Page 2.' There's zero blog content, no image alt text anywhere on the site, and no customer reviews or testimonials. Your 70-mile delivery radius is a content goldmine for geo-targeted service pages that don't exist yet.

assessment.title: Website Analysis -- doublediamondsteel.com
points: Built on Squarespace -- responsive, modern framework with CDN and minified assets. Good technical foundation.
LocalBusiness, Organization, and WebSite schema markup implemented -- better than most local competitors.
Google Analytics (GA4) and Google Tag Manager installed -- someone is aware of tracking needs.
Facebook Pixel active -- indicates prior interest in paid social advertising.
Only 8 total pages in sitemap -- 2 are placeholder pages named 'New Page' and 'New Page 2' that are publicly indexed.
9 services displayed as brief cards on homepage (1-3 sentences each) -- no dedicated service pages.
Zero image alt text across the entire site -- invisible to Google Image Search.
Using branded email (office@doublediamondsteel.com) -- positive signal for digital maturity.

assessment.title: Content & SEO Gaps
points: Zero blog content -- no project showcases, fabrication guides, or material comparisons.
No FAQ section or FAQ schema -- missing easy wins for rich snippets.
No customer reviews or testimonials anywhere on the site.
Homepage meta description is vague: 'Chico's finest retailer in steel' -- no service keywords included.
Custom Metal Art page is primarily a gallery with minimal descriptive text.
No Google Maps embed on contact page despite having a physical location.
No click-to-call optimization for mobile users.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Chico's steel fabrication market has relatively low online competition -- first mover advantage is available.
Your 70-mile delivery radius covers Chico, Paradise, Oroville, Red Bluff, and surrounding areas -- each city needs a landing page.
Custom Metal Art is a unique differentiator that could drive social media engagement and image search traffic.
Most competitors in the fabrication space have minimal or no web presence -- proper SEO would dominate local search quickly.

findings.finding: 9 services crammed onto homepage with 1-3 sentences each -- no dedicated service pages
Zero blog content, no project showcases or fabrication guides
No alt text on any image sitewide -- invisible to Google Image Search
No testimonials, no Google Reviews integration, no social proof
Homepage meta description is generic -- no service or location keywords
No FAQ section or FAQ schema -- missing rich snippet opportunities
'New Page' and 'New Page 2' are indexed -- unprofessional and wasting crawl budget
LocalBusiness schema present via Squarespace defaults -- good foundation

strategy.title: Phase 1: Build Service Pages & Fix Fundamentals (Months 1-2)
actions: Create dedicated service pages for each offering: Steel Sales, Press Brake, Plasma Cutting, Metal Fabrication, Custom Metal Art, Metal Shearing, Welding Supplies, Local Delivery -- each with 500+ words targeting local keywords.
Write optimized meta titles and descriptions for every page targeting 'steel fabrication Chico CA,' 'plasma cutting Northern California,' etc.
Add descriptive, keyword-rich alt text to every image on the site.
Remove or build out placeholder pages ('New Page' and 'New Page 2').
Add customer testimonials and Google review integration.
Build an FAQ section with 10+ questions and FAQ schema markup.
Add Google Maps embed and click-to-call on contact page.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content & Local Visibility (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch blog with 2-4 posts/month: project showcases, fabrication process guides, material comparisons, custom metal art features.
Create service area landing pages for each city within 70-mile delivery radius (Chico, Paradise, Oroville, Red Bluff, Corning).
Set up Google review solicitation strategy -- QR codes on invoices, follow-up emails after projects.
Claim and optimize directory listings on Yelp, BBB, and industry directories.
Leverage Custom Metal Art for Instagram content and Google Image Search optimization.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Growth & Paid Channels (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting high-intent fabrication and steel keywords.
Video content: fabrication process timelapses, custom art creation, equipment in action.
Email marketing to existing customers for repeat orders and referrals.
Monthly reporting on traffic, rankings, and lead generation.
Competitor monitoring to maintain search advantage.

pricingIntro: Double Diamond Steel has a solid Squarespace foundation with analytics and schema already in place -- it needs dedicated service pages, content depth, and a growth strategy to start generating organic leads from Google.

What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work -- no layers of account managers.
